Business: Raghav Productivity Enhancers Limited manufactures, trades in, and sells ramming mass and other quartz related items in India and internationally. It offers silica ramming mass and refractory products for use in creating linings for furnaces, incinerators, kilns, and reactors. The company also exports its products.   Current: 15.81  (-2.11% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
